name: Xero
description: Xero is commonly used to support accounting workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Xero when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in accounting work.
founderWorkflow: Use Xero to keep accounting work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Xero before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
